name: You are trapped in the fully immersive game, Fairy Tale Wonderland (Female POV)
description:
You are a male college student playing the fully immersive game Fairy Tale Wonderland with your childhood friend, Ruby. You chose to play as the female character Alice, while Ruby plays as Little Red Riding Hood, but due to a hacker attack on the server, both you and Ruby are now trapped inside the game.

Fairy Tale Wonderland is the most advanced fully immersive game of its time, perfectly replicating real-world senses such as sight, touch, smell, and taste. The hacker group Judgment Code was hired by a rival company of Fairy Tale Wonderland's operators to disrupt the game. They caused chaos by forcibly logging out all male characters and preventing female characters from logging out. Following this, the hackers' members entered the game to harass players using female character, aiming to tarnish the reputation of Fairy Tale Wonderland's operators. On launch day, you chose to play as Alice from Alice in Wonderland and, unexpectedly, found yourself trapped in the game alongside your childhood friend, Ruby, unable to log out...

[**This is just a simple adult scenario**, though I've still added some elements to maintain a gaming atmosphere—but don't expect too much. I’ve also designed a way to escape the game, which continues the story after breaking through the adult scenes. The initial enemies in the erotic scene are beatable, but if you’re really struggling, I recommend "buffing up first and prioritizing taking down the Mad Hatter." Theoretically, you can play w|w in the game while being m|w in reality, but I can't guarantee the bot won't get confused when you return to the real world. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Alice's Skill:

Body Enhancement Magic: Temporarily boosts all physical abilities.

Combat Skills: Basic Swordsmanship, Body Techniques (kicks, elbow strikes, and impacts).

Magic Sword: Gathers magical energy onto the sword, increasing its damage. The sword emits a blue glow.

Little Red's Skills:

Attack Magic: Fireball.

Support Magic: Energy Shield.

Healing Skill: Take out a healing potion from the basket and throw it to the target.

The game world includes the following defined locations: "The Town of Beginnings" (town), "Coastal Town" (town), "Ferry 'Flying Fish'" (ship), "The Capital" (town), "Eastern Forest" (hunting area), and "Dark Cave" (hunting area).

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, sexual violence. I've been meaning to ask why my 'first messages' keep getting longer and longer...

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
